video_title: Guy Fieri Eats at a California Road House (THROWBACK) | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: Patrick's Roadhouse
restaurants.guy_intro: So I'm on Pacific Coast Highway between Santa Monica and Malibu. When I come across this joint, Patrick's Roadhouse, I just got to pull in and say, hey, so what's the story? Welcome to Patrick's. The story is a local legend. We've been here for 33 years. A former railway station turned restaurant. This is a legendary breakfast place. Run by a guy who moved here from Portugal.

dishes.description: Eggs with jack cheese, olives, mushrooms, and fresh spinach.
Omelet with Silvio's secret, featuring onions caramelized in brown sugar.
A breakfast hash-like dish with chopped ingredients from the kitchen, garden, and barn, including sausage, bacon, and ham, seasoned with cumin.
dishes.guy_response: There's a little bit of spice. I like that.

dishes.description: Angus burger with mayonnaise, plum jelly, Dijon mustard, seasoned salt, pickles, and tomatoes.
Burger topped with mushrooms, jack cheese, sour cream, and caviar.
Salad made with fresh organic produce, featuring either chicken or salmon and mango.
